mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_question (question_text, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, correct_option, teacher_id) VALUES (#{questionText}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{correctOption}, #{teacherId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM quiz_question ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM quiz_question ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
